files.patch:
@@ -52,7 +52,7 @@ jobs:
     - name: Run Tests (Unit Tests Only)
       run: |
         if [[ "${{ runner.os }}" == "Linux" ]]; then
-          swift test --filter TachikomaTests --skip "AudioProvidersTests"
+          swift test --filter TachikomaTests --skip "AudioProvidersTests" --skip "ProviderEndToEndTests"
         else
           swift test --filter TachikomaTests
         fi

@@ -92,7 +92,13 @@ jobs:
         run: swift build
       
       - name: Run tests
-        run: swift test
+        run: |
+          SKIP_FLAGS="--skip ProviderEndToEndTests"
+          if [[ -z "$OPENAI_API_KEY" ]]; then
+            echo "OPENAI_API_KEY missing; skipping AudioProvidersTests"
+            SKIP_FLAGS="$SKIP_FLAGS --skip AudioProvidersTests"
+          fi
+          swift test $SKIP_FLAGS
         env:
           OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
           ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}
@@ -116,7 +122,13 @@ jobs:
         run: swift build
       
       - name: Run tests
-        run: swift test
+        run: |
+          SKIP_FLAGS="--skip ProviderEndToEndTests"
+          if [[ -z "$OPENAI_API_KEY" ]]; then
+            echo "OPENAI_API_KEY missing; skipping AudioProvidersTests"
+            SKIP_FLAGS="$SKIP_FLAGS --skip AudioProvidersTests"
+          fi
+          swift test $SKIP_FLAGS
         env:
           OPENAI_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.OPENAI_API_KEY }}
           ANTHROPIC_API_KEY: ${{ secrets.ANTHROPIC_API_KEY }}

@@ -99,10 +99,10 @@ jobs:
 
     - name: Test
       run: |
-        SKIP_FLAGS=""
+        SKIP_FLAGS="--skip ProviderEndToEndTests"
         if [[ -z "$OPENAI_API_KEY" ]]; then
           echo "OPENAI_API_KEY missing; skipping AudioProvidersTests"
-          SKIP_FLAGS='--skip AudioProvidersTests'
+          SKIP_FLAGS="$SKIP_FLAGS --skip AudioProvidersTests"
         fi
         swift test --verbose --parallel $SKIP_FLAGS
       env:
